name: Angela Wyatt
bio: Angela Wyatt serves as the Mayor of Rusk, the county seat of Cherokee County. Rusk is home to the Texas State Railroad and a historic footbridge, one of the longest in the nation. The mayor works with the city council to promote tourism and maintain city services for the community.
campaignPromises: Promote Rusk's historical attractions and tourism
Improve city infrastructure and water systems
Support economic development and job creation
Maintain city services within a responsible budget
Enhance community parks and recreational areas
